subject: fix(security): add sandbox attribute to script-embed iframe in embed.js
body:
The EmbedCodeDialog iframe snippet was sandboxed in the previous commit,
but the script embed path (embed.js) creates iframes dynamically without
sandbox. This adds the same sandbox restrictions to the recommended embed
method for consistent security across both embed paths.

sandbox="allow-same-origin allow-scripts allow-popups allow-forms"

Verified: postMessage auto-resize, isEmbedMode() detection, Supabase
auth cookies, and form JavaScript all work within these sandbox rules.

Tags: security, embed
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: ui-polish
Semver: patch
